message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and should have a star of 4
The hotel should include free parking
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 8 people and 2 nights starting from friday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should arrive by 14:30 and should go to cambridge
The train should be on the same day as the hotel booking and should depart from stevenage
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
